summary: Implementation contract review for stdin-only refactor. All 12 acceptance criteria map 1:1 to demo_steps (AC1->D1 through AC12->D12). Edge cases comprehensively cover TTY guard trichotomy (true/false/undefined), Windows EAGAIN/EOF/-4095, 0-byte trim, U+FEFF BOM strip, line-hinted JSON via SyntaxError position scan, and the three-way evidence-add/task-record-add matrix (stdin+set overlay, empty+set base, empty+no-set error). Non-goals correctly enumerate event.ts --data, context.ts write --data, packet.ts create --file/--content as preserved non-JSON value flags. Planned action #15 explicitly grep-verifies these are untouched before build. Integration.js rewrite scope (~17 sites) matches. Unit test plan covers all six required cases including isTTY=undefined negative guard and Windows readFileSync(0) mock. No blocking concerns.
concerns: Minor: demo_step AC5 sample 'printf {\n"foo":\n}' closes with } and may parse ambiguously; worker should pick a concretely malformed payload (e.g. trailing comma) to guarantee SyntaxError fires with a line>1 hint.
Minor: AC8 demo uses 'echo {...}' without -n, appending a newline; trim() handles it but worker should confirm behavior in the actual pipe test.
Nit: no explicit demo step for U+FEFF BOM stripping although it is in edge_cases and planned_actions #4; worker should add a unit test assertion for it.
